popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: ABOUT a mile and a half eastward from Wrotham church, near Addington common, lies FORD, so called from the ford here over the brook, which rises at Neupiker in this parish, and runs close by this hous …

zh.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall是John Clarke和Lady Sarah Warrett的兒子，於1394年出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦。他於1417年與Lady Susan Agnes Forde在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1482年12月10日在他的家鄉享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall是John Clarke和Lady Sarah Warrett的儿子，于1394年出生在英国英格兰肯特萊坦。他于1417年与Lady Susan Agnes Forde在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1482年12月10日在他的家乡享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

variants.name: Clarke
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clerk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Jacques.
Americanized form of French   Clerc   and perhaps also of the Dutch and Flemish cognates   De Klerk   and   De Clerck   or of variants of these names. Compare   Clark   3.

variants.name: Clerkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Brendan, Dympna, Seamus.

Irish (Monaghan): from an Irish pet form of English clerk ‘cleric’ (Irish cléireach), see Clark . Alternatively, an Anglicized form of Ó Cléireacháin, ‘descendant of little cleric’, an Irish diminutive of the word. See also McClurkin , an Antrim surname from Mac Cléirchín ‘son of little cleric’.

variants.name: Calarco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Carmelo, Fausto, Nunziato, Salvatore.
Italian (southern): probably a nickname derived from Greek kalē archē ‘good beginning’. Compare Clark 4.

variants.name: Clerc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Odette, Sebastien, Serge.

French: occupational or status name for a member of a minor religious order or for a scholar, Old French clerc, from Late Latin clericus, from Greek klērikos, a derivative of klēros ‘inheritance, legacy’, with reference to the priestly tribe of Levites (see Levy ) ‘whose inheritance was the Lord’. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established. In the Middle Ages it was virtually only members of religious orders who learned to read and write, so that the term clerc later came to denote any literate man, a scholar (hence its modern meaning ‘scribe, secretary’ or ‘clerk’). Compare Leclerc .

variants.name: Clarkson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from   Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall was born in 1394, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Clarke and Lady Sarah Warrett. He married Lady Susan Agnes Forde in 1417, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 10 December 1482, in his hometown, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall est né en 1394, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Clarke et Lady Sarah Warrett. Il a épousé Lady Susan Agnes Forde en 1417, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 décembre 1482, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall wurde 1394 in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Clarke und Lady Sarah Warrett geboren. Er hat 1417 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Lady Susan Agnes Forde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Dezember 1482 im Alter von 88 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall è nato il nel 1394 nel Wrotham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Clarke e Lady Sarah Warrett. Lui sposato Lady Susan Agnes Forde nel 1417, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 dicembre 1482, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hallは1394年にイギリスイギリスケントウロサムでJohn ClarkeとLady Sarah Warrettの息子として生まれた。1417年にイギリスイギリスケントでLady Susan Agnes Fordeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1482年12月10日に故郷で88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall(은)는 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 John Clarke(와)과 Lady Sarah Warrett의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Lady Susan Agnes Forde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 12월 10일 그의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall nasceu em 1394, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John Clarke e Lady Sarah Warrett. Ele casou-se com Lady Susan Agnes Forde em 1417, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de dezembro de 1482, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall родился в 1394 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Clarke и Lady Sarah Warrett. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Susan Agnes Forde в 1417 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 декабря 1482 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall nació en 1394, en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John Clarke y Lady Sarah Warrett. Se casó con Lady Susan Agnes Forde en 1417, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1482, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años.
